title: Prof. Dr. Eduardo Greaves • Thorium as Nuclear Fuel in the Molten Salt Reactor
description:
A New Paradigm: Thorium as Nuclear Fuel in the Molten Salt Reactor
--
Prof. Dr. Eduardo Greaves, Nuclear physicist, specialist of 4th generation nuclear reactor designs, thorium and Molten Salt Reactors. Institut de Physique Nucléaire, France; expert for the IAEA; founder of the Venezuelan Nuclear Society and the nuclear physics department of the Simon Bolivar University, Caracas, Venezuela
--
Schiller Institute Conference
Attaining Freedom Through Necessity:
THE LAST CHANCE FOR HUMANITY
Frankfurt, Germany
April 13-14, 2013
--
